name: Volcengine Ark
description: Registers ByteDance Volcengine Ark / Doubao as a first-party OpenAI-compatible model provider using ARK_API_KEY, VOLCENGINE_API_KEY, or a Plugin Setting.

env.description: Fallback Volcengine Ark API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback Volcengine Ark API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting or ARK_API_KEY is configured.

settings.label: Volcengine Ark API key
settings.description: Volcengine Ark API key used for inference. Falls back to ARK_API_KEY, then VOLCENGINE_API_KEY.

providers.name: Volcengine Ark
providers.description: Runs documented Volcengine Ark Doubao chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
